payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active/current memory for Sam from Goldman. It filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would violate the rule against surfacing superseded facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam from Goldman; recall selected the current memory associated with that entity context and excluded the older superseded version.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned because it is the current non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as a current fact.
